creator: mikhail.maximov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #17)

[adm@server ~]$ sudo dmesg | grep -i vesa
module_register_init: MOD_LOAD (vesa, 0xffffffff811848b0, 0) error 19

[adm@server ~]$ sudo grep -i vesa /etc/rc.conf

[adm@server ~]$ sudo grep -i vesa /boot/loader.conf

[adm@server ~]$ uname -a
FreeBSD server.xxxxx 12.3-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC  amd64
